blocks.text: Match preview: Leicestershire face Essex in 33rd Match (TEST) on Fri, 12 Jun, 2026, 3:30 pm at Grace Road Leicester. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard TEST surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 300–400 runs per innings typical.
Light drizzle · High 21°C / Low 15°C · Rain: 0.4 mm · Wind: up to 27 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
